name: io.github.rogertheunissenmerge-oss/mcp-server
description: Wine pairing intelligence with 7 tools. Deterministic scoring, sommelier-calibrated.

environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for Pro/Enterprise tier access. Without a key, free tier (50 calls/day) is used.
environmentVariables.name: SOMMELIERX_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Default language for responses: en, nl, fr, de, es, or it.
environmentVariables.name: SOMMELIERX_LANGUAGE
